description: AI agent skill system covering skill engineering plus general agent workflows for review, debugging, testing, requirements, planning, observability, incident retros, git, security, verification, and configuration.

release_policy.publish_policy: v3.0 is the first ecosystem-ready milestone; public publishing still requires an explicit user request.

skills.name: skill-authoring-workflow
skills.summary: Create SKILL.md files from requirements using quick and full authoring workflows.

skills.name: skill-review-workflow
skills.summary: Review SKILL.md quality with a 23-item checklist and weighted scorecard.

skills.name: agent-security-guard
skills.summary: Gate risky operations, secret exposure, and shell-injection-prone actions.

skills.name: cross-model-verification
skills.summary: Run adversarial second-opinion reviews with redaction and degraded-mode handling.

skills.name: skill-pipeline-orchestrator
skills.summary: Coordinate authoring, review, security, cross-check, package, and deployment stages.

skills.name: git-workflow-for-agents
skills.summary: Standardize agent git workflows from status checks through PR creation.

skills.name: agent-config-reference
skills.summary: Reference platform-specific config, skill paths, migration, and troubleshooting.

skills.name: code-review-workflow
skills.summary: Review ordinary code, diffs, patches, and pull requests for bugs, risk, and missing tests.

skills.name: systematic-debugging
skills.summary: Reproduce, isolate, fix, and verify failures without guessing.

skills.name: test-design-workflow
skills.summary: Design risk-based success, failure, boundary, and regression tests for behavior changes.

skills.name: requirements-clarifier
skills.summary: Turn vague feature, bug, product, or workflow requests into testable acceptance criteria.

skills.name: planning-workflow
skills.summary: Plan projects, migrations, refactors, releases, and risky multi-step work with validation gates.

skills.name: observability-workflow
skills.summary: Design logs, metrics, traces, alerts, dashboards, and health checks around failure modes.

skills.name: incident-retro-workflow
skills.summary: Create blameless incident retros with timelines, impact, root causes, and verified action items.

rules: Deprecated skills remain installable for one major version unless a security issue requires removal.
Deprecated skills must name a replacement or state why no replacement exists.
Migration paths must describe the user-visible install and trigger changes.
